label: Test Pipeline

files.raw_diff:
diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Start pipeline run successfully via API
scenarios.description: Submit a valid PipelineRunRequest to POST /api/pipeline/run and receive run_id with queued status
preconditions: No existing runs blocking the queue
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 202 Accepted with JSON body containing run_id (UUID format) and status 'queued'

scenarios.title: Pipeline run triggers SSE status stream
scenarios.description: After starting a run, connect to GET /api/pipeline/status/{run_id} and receive SSE events
preconditions: Valid run_id from previous POST /run request
scenarios.expected_result: SSE stream opens and emits PipelineStage events with progressing status until completion

scenarios.title: Complete pipeline run appears in reports list
scenarios.description: After a pipeline run completes, it should be retrievable via GET /api/reports
scenarios.expected_result: Reports list contains the new run_id with correct status, label, and test/heal counts

scenarios.title: Start run with missing required fields in request body
scenarios.description: Submit POST /api/pipeline/run with incomplete PipelineRunRequest missing required fields
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 422 Unprocessable Entity with validation error details

scenarios.title: Start run with malformed JSON body
scenarios.description: Submit POST /api/pipeline/run with syntactically invalid JSON payload
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 400 Bad Request indicating JSON parse error

scenarios.title: Start run with wrong content type header
scenarios.description: Submit POST /api/pipeline/run with text/plain instead of application/json
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 415 Unsupported Media Type or 422 validation error

scenarios.title: Concurrent pipeline runs generate unique run_ids
scenarios.description: Submit multiple POST /api/pipeline/run requests simultaneously and verify unique run_ids
scenarios.expected_result: All 5 responses return status 202 with unique UUID run_ids, no duplicates

scenarios.title: SSE connection for non-existent run_id returns error
scenarios.description: Attempt to connect to SSE stream with a run_id that was never created
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 404 Not Found or SSE stream with error event

scenarios.title: SSE connection timeout handling
scenarios.description: Verify SSE connection handles timeout gracefully when pipeline stalls
scenarios.expected_result: SSE stream emits timeout error event or closes gracefully without hanging indefinitely

scenarios.title: Unauthorized pipeline run attempt
scenarios.description: Attempt to start a pipeline run without proper authentication credentials
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 401 Unauthorized with appropriate error message

scenarios.title: IDOR attempt to access another run's status
scenarios.description: Try to access SSE stream or report for run_id belonging to another user/tenant

steps.value: POST /api/pipeline/run as User A, capture run_id

scenarios.expected_result: Response status 403 Forbidden or 404 Not Found, no status details leaked

scenarios.title: Injection attempt in PipelineRunRequest fields
scenarios.description: Submit POST /api/pipeline/run with SQL injection and XSS payloads in request fields

steps.value: POST /api/pipeline/run with label: "'; DROP TABLE runs; --"

scenarios.expected_result: Request processed safely, malicious input is escaped/rejected, no database errors exposed

scenarios.title: Empty reports directory returns empty list
scenarios.description: GET /api/reports returns empty array when no pipeline runs have completed
preconditions: REPORTS_DIR is empty or does not exist
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 200 with empty JSON array []

scenarios.title: Invalid UUID format in run_id path parameter
scenarios.description: Request SSE status with malformed run_id that is not a valid UUID
scenarios.expected_result: Response status 400 Bad Request or 422 with path validation error
